scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 execute jstock-db --local --file=./migrations/0001_init_schema.sql && wrangler d1 execute jstock-db --local --file=./migrations/0002_seed_etfs.sql
scripts.db:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 execute jstock-db --remote --file=./migrations/0001_init_schema.sql && wrangler d1 execute jstock-db --remote --file=./migrations/0002_seed_etfs.sql
